author: @marklewis8776
text: No litter boxes in classrooms? Are you saying it was only just a rumor? All I can tell you is what I had three separate coworkers tell me at three separate times.  A mother pulled her kid out of school over the litter box and she said the school didn't bother denying the allegation. One part timer came after school and said she was annoyed there was a litter box in her classroom (she went to the same school as the mother) and a male part timer said the school he went to had a litter box in the classroom for their librarian's kid (smaller school and the librarian had the colored hair and 2-4 kids all with major mental and social issues; so, make of that what you will). This is just what they said. To be fair, this was 3 or so years ago, so not sure if what they said was true or still going on.
